1.title: CPU logical cores
1.query:
timeseries logical_cores = avg(dt.containers.cpu.logical_cores),
  by: { dt.entity.container_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd container_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.container_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(logical_cores) desc
| limit 20

2.title: CPU shares
2.query:
timeseries shares = avg(dt.containers.cpu.shares),
  by: { dt.entity.container_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd container_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.container_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(shares) desc
| limit 20

| sort arrayAvg(throttled_time) desc
| limit 20
